title: Universal Jar
description: A vanilla-enhancing modpack able to be used on any vanilla servers or worlds.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e33b3e303148e6f7ac3dea101188ecfb7a2f4771.png) ## A modpack able to be used across different servers and worlds. **Increases the framerate of the game while improving the experience and quality of minecraft.**
_(other versions for the game are coming soon)_ ## UPDATE I kinda forgot about this project, but over the past 2 years I have grown way better at making modpacks. This project will most likely be rebranded. New versions of Universal Jar will be coming soon for: - **1.20.1** Fabric & Forge - **1.21.1** Fabric & Neoforge - **1.21.11** Fabric & Neoforge - **26.1.2** Fabric & Neoforge
